ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Sauce 44% (water, tomato paste, sunflower oil, sugar, wine, mustard, salt, spices, vinegar), fish (mackerel) 40%, vegetable 16% (carrot, turnip, green tomato, cucumber, green and red pepper, celery stalk).
